Author: miwi
Date: Thu Feb 27 08:41:56 2014
New Revision: 346259
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/346259
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r346259/

Log:
  - Update to version 1.10
  
  PR:		187038
  Submitted by:	ports fury

Modified:
  head/x11-wm/sawfish/Makefile
  head/x11-wm/sawfish/distinfo
  head/x11-wm/sawfish/pkg-plist

Modified: head/x11-wm/sawfish/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/x11-wm/sawfish/Makefile	Thu Feb 27 08:41:12 2014	(r346258)
+++ head/x11-wm/sawfish/Makefile	Thu Feb 27 08:41:56 2014	(r346259)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	sawfish
-PORTVERSION=	1.9.1
+PORTVERSION=	1.10
 PORTEPOCH=	3
 CATEGORIES=	x11-wm
 MASTER_SITES=	http://download.tuxfamily.org/sawfish/%SUBDIR%/
@@ -21,7 +21,7 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	rep-gtk2>=0.90:${PORTSDIR}/
 USE_XZ=		yes
 USES=		gettext gmake pathfix pkgconfig
 USE_XORG=	ice sm x11 xft xinerama xrandr xtst
-USE_GNOME=	cairo gnomehier gtk20 pangox-compat
+USE_GNOME=	cairo gnomehier gtk20
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--localstatedir=${PREFIX}/share \
 		--datadir=${PREFIX}/share
@@ -32,8 +32,6 @@ LDFLAGS+=	-L${LOCALBASE}/lib
 
 INFO=		sawfish
 
-PORTSCOUT=	limit:^1\.9\.[0-9]
-
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
 		'/dnsdomainname/d' ${WRKSRC}/build-info
